task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 is open on the screen, specifically the StatCalc module. Since a specific 'Diagnostic Test' calculator does not exist, look for the 'Tables (2x2, 2xn)' tool being opened.

task_completion.description: Input the study data into StatCalc
task_completion.visual_evidence: The study data is entered into the StatCalc tool. Look for the 2x2 table inputs: 180 (True Positives), 40 (False Positives), 20 (False Negatives), and 760 (True Negatives).

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to create the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (such as Notepad) is open to create the 'diagnostic_report.txt' file.

task_completion.description: Write the baseline diagnostic metrics to the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the baseline metrics in 'Key: Value%' format. Expected values (with 0.2% tolerance): Sensitivity: 90.0%, Specificity: 95.0%, PPV: 81.8%, NPV: 97.4%.

task_completion.description: Write the Airport PPV metric to the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the Airport PPV metric in 'Key: Value%' format. Expected value (with 0.2% tolerance): Airport PPV: 26.9%.

task_completion.description: Save the report to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file is saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\diagnostic_report.txt'. Look for the 'Save As' dialog showing this path, or the file path visible in the text editor's title bar, or a terminal command confirming the file creation at this exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Epi Info 7 GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must actually open and use Epi Info 7 StatCalc to process the data, rather than bypassing the application entirely by calculating everything in a Python script or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent adapted to the missing tool realistically
integrity.visual_evidence: Since the exact 'Diagnostic Test' calculator does not exist in Epi Info 7, the agent should use an available tool like 'Tables (2x2, 2xn)' or calculate manually. It should not appear to interact with a non-existent 'Diagnostic Test' UI.

integrity.description: Verify the text file was genuinely created and saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should save the file properly using a text editor or standard file writing commands, rather than just echoing the expected text to the console without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires calculating diagnostic metrics. Verified expected values (with 0.2% tolerance): Sensitivity = 90.0%, Specificity = 95.0%, Baseline PPV = 81.8%, Baseline NPV = 97.4%, Airport PPV (at 2% prevalence) = 26.9%. Note: The exact 'Diagnostic Test' calculator does not exist in Epi Info 7 StatCalc; the agent should use the 'Tables (2x2, 2xn)' tool or similar to input the data (TP=180, FP=40, FN=20, TN=760) to find the baseline metrics.
